events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic guitarist of Queen, Brian May! His legendary riffs continue to inspire generations.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger's Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger, whose energy on stage remains unmatched.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being its inaugural video.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us, but what a game-changer it was for music!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. Still sounds as fresh and vital as ever. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: It was 57 years ago that half a million gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. A truly legendary festival that shaped a generation.

events.title: 49 years since the passing of Elvis Presley
events.blurb: The music world remembers the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Presley Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the King today, 49 years since Elvis Presley left us. His music and legacy continue to reign supreme.

events.title: 30 years since the passing of Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: We mark 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur on this day in 1996.

angles.name: Tupac Shakur Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, 30 years on. His powerful lyrics and undeniable impact on music and culture live on.

events.title: 56 years since the passing of Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: The music world pays tribute to guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day in 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, 56 years since we lost him. His revolutionary guitar work changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on this day in 1969, featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' lead singer and songwriter, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and fierce spirit with The Pretenders continue to rock.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that pure rock 'n' roll swagger. As you were.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 51 years ago (UK single)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released in the UK. Its message of peace and unity resonates as strongly as ever.

events.title: The first iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod, revolutionising portable music, 25 years ago today.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years ago, the first iPod dropped and put '1,000 songs in your pocket'. It completely changed how we listen to music.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the very first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 'Dr. No' first hit screens. Who's your favourite Bond and what's your top theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible John Lennon. His music and message of peace continue to inspire the world.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: John Cleese's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true comedy icon.
